title: When determining systemd mode, use full command
body:
We were only using the Command field in specgen when determining whether to enable systemd if systemd=true (the default) was used. This does not include the entrypoint, and does not include any entrypoint/command sourced from the image - so an image could be running systemd and we'd not correctly detect this. Using the full, final command resolves this and matches Podman v1.9.x behavior.

Fixes #6920
